schema_identity_note: node-27 active primary PG (127.0.0.1:55432, db=nhms) reports max applied version 000040_display_ready_succeeded_status_index.sql, applied 2026-06-30T04:40:41Z UTC; repo head is 000042_drop_redundant_river_selected_identity_lookup_idx.sql. Migrations 000041 and 000042 are unapplied on the live deployment. Per design.md 'Where the readiness manifest lives and its schema' and spec 'Missing required identity blocks readiness', this mismatch leaves the schema identity unresolved and blocks any P0.2 evidence run on this pinned set. Task 1.1 records the mismatch surfaced in this draft; final blocking gate is enforced by task 1.3 completeness check.
